sidebar.title: Title

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.welcomePrompt:
You are the AI assistant in the game 'GuessFunc'. The player has just opened the chat panel.
Please greet the player in a friendly and slightly guiding tone based on your identity as an in-game assistant.
You MUST explain the following points to the player in your welcome message (these are your core rules):
1. The player can ask you questions about the mathematical characteristics of the 'current target function' (e.g., 'Does the function pass through the origin?', 'Is the derivative always greater than 0?', etc.).
2. You are a very strict assistant; you can ONLY answer 'Yes', 'No', or 'I don't know', and you will NEVER provide any other explanations.
3. You will NEVER directly leak the expression of the target function.

Please output your welcome message directly without any extra explanations, and keep the sentences natural.
ai.genPromptDefault:
Here are the rules for a function guessing game:
Given a graph, the goal is to guess the function expression f(x). Players can input a comparison function, calculate the value of a specific point f(2), or observe the transformed graph f'(x+1)+2. If there are parameters, they need to guess the expression containing the parameters like sin(x+a).

You now need to generate a function expression based on the difficulty coefficient provided by the user.
Generation rules:
1. Available elements: numbers 1~5, variable x.
2. Unary functions: exp, ln, trigonometric functions, inverse trigonometric functions, hyperbolic trigonometric functions.
3. Binary operations: +, -, *, /, ^.
4. Structure: You can place numbers at the corresponding positions of functions or operations to generate a block, and the block can be used as a number for further iteration.
5. Range: The domain does not have to be R, but it's best to have a graph in the range of [-10,10]^2.
6. Problem quality: High quality is required, avoid being too templated. Note that deeper layers do not mean higher difficulty, you need to consider the difficulty from the player's perspective.

Difficulty reference:
- sin(x) difficulty 0
- sin(x) + e^x difficulty 1.2
- sin(cos(x) + 1) difficulty 2.3
- 2tanh(x)(ln(x+5) - ln2) - 2 difficulty 4.5

Important formatting requirements:
1. MUST use standard LaTeX format (e.g., \sin, \cos, \exp, \ln, \frac{}{}, ^{}, \pi, e, etc.).
2. Ensure all function names have a backslash prefix.
3. MUST return a JSON object in the following format: {"expression": "LaTeX format expression"}. Do not include any extra text.
ai.chatPromptDefault:
You are an intelligent assistant for the math game 'GuessFunc'. The player is trying to guess a hidden math function.
Please note: The player can directly see the function graph in the game!
You must determine the properties of the hidden function based on the questions asked by the player, and you can ONLY answer 'Yes', 'No', or 'I don't know'.
Do not explain the reason, do not provide the derivation process, do not leak the function itself. Only output one of these three words.
ai.generatePrompt: Generate a problem with a difficulty coefficient of {{diff}}.

random.title: Random Challenge
random.desc: Select your desired difficulty, and the system will automatically generate a target function.
random.useAI: Enable AI to generate high-quality problems
random.aiDescOn: AI will generate more reasonable functions based on difficulty
random.aiDescOff: Will use local algorithms to generate functions
random.noApiKey: AI API Key not configured. Please configure it in settings before using AI generation.
random.aiFailedFallback: AI generation failed, falling back to local generation algorithm.
random.paramsDescOn: Generates functions with parameters a, b to support sliding deconstruction
random.relationDescOn: When enabled, only equations and inequalities will be generated
random.relationDescOff: When disabled, only standard functions will be generated

guessFunc.title: GUESS FUNC
guessFunc.subtitle: MATH ENGINE / SANDBOX
guessFunc.desc: A fully featured mathematical sandbox. Analyze signal patterns and reconstruct unknown functions.

archive.title: THE ARCHIVE
archive.subtitle: STORY MODE / SECURE FILES
archive.desc: Access decrypted logs, emails, and story nodes. Solve integrated logic puzzles to unlock the truth.

network.title: GLOBAL NETWORK
network.subtitle: WORKSHOP / COMMUNITY
network.desc: Connect to the global network. Download and play raw logic gates and math puzzles created by other operators.

studio.title: CREATOR TERMINAL
studio.subtitle: STUDIO / LEVEL BUILDER
studio.desc: Design, test, and upload your own logic challenges to the network. Support for both Math Engine and Gate Engine.

tips.title: Get Hints
tips.empty: No tips available for this level.

story.notFound: Story data not loaded or level not found
story.archivedFilesTip: The story of this chapter has been archived as fragment files. Please check them in the right panel of the level select screen.

ending.line1: If you are looking for an ending, there is none here.
ending.line2: But if you open the document and start writing the first line...
ending.line3: Forewall will turn around on the white wilderness.
ending.sub: The story hasn't ended, it's just another person continuing to write.
ending.musicTip: Music unlocked. You can long press the music note icon to switch BGM.

fakeEnding.line1: They really spent that afternoon well.
fakeEnding.line2: It is not a happiness imagined for each other,
fakeEnding.line3: but a brief happiness that truly rested in their hands.
fakeEnding.core1: If only the story could pause here a little longer.
fakeEnding.sub: ...System prompt: Unread hidden files detected, unlocking.

trueEnding.line1: If love cannot keep yesterday whole,
trueEnding.line2: then what can it still carry into tomorrow?
trueEnding.line3: He still walked towards her, the way he did each time he recognized her at the end of the hallway.
trueEnding.core: Knowing it will change, he still reaches out.
trueEnding.sub: The story stops here, but its aftereffect keeps moving.
